questions.text: Which of these is a non-renewable source of energy?
questions.explanation: Coal is a fossil fuel and non-renewable. Solar, wind, and hydro are renewable energy sources.

questions.text: Biogas is produced from organic waste.
questions.explanation: Biogas is produced by anaerobic decomposition of organic matter like cow dung, plant waste, etc.

questions.text: What is the main component of CNG?
questions.explanation: CNG (Compressed Natural Gas) mainly contains methane. It is a cleaner fuel than petrol or diesel.

questions.text: The device used to convert solar energy into electricity is called ________ cell.
questions.explanation: Solar cells (photovoltaic cells) convert sunlight directly into electricity.
